CREATE TABLE md5_context (context_id INT PRIMARY KEY, initialized BOOLEAN, context_data BLOB);
INSERT INTO md5_context (context_id, initialized, context_data) VALUES (1, TRUE, 'some_initial_data');
INSERT INTO md5_context (context_id, initialized, context_data) VALUES (2, TRUE, 'another_initial_data');
INSERT INTO md5_context (context_id, initialized, context_data) VALUES (3, FALSE, 'not_initialized_data');
SELECT md5_final(context_data) FROM md5_context WHERE context_id = 1 AND initialized = TRUE;
SELECT md5_final(context_data) FROM md5_context WHERE context_id IN (SELECT context_id FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE LIMIT 1);
SELECT md5_final(context_data) FROM (SELECT context_data FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE ORDER BY context_id DESC) AS initialized_contexts WHERE ROWNUM = 1;
SELECT md5_final(context_data) FROM (SELECT context_data FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE) AS subquery WHERE context_id = (SELECT MAX(context_id) FROM md5_context);
UPDATE md5_context SET context_data = SHA256(context_data) WHERE context_id = 1;
DELETE FROM md5_context WHERE context_id NOT IN (SELECT context_id FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE);
CREATE TABLE test_results (test_id INT PRIMARY KEY, checksum BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_results (test_id, checksum) SELECT context_id, md5_final(context_data) FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM md5_context WHERE initialized = TRUE AND md5_final(context_data) IS NOT NULL;
